description: "Delete a repository record, or ensure it doesn't exist. Requires auth, implemented by PDS."

  children={"network.habitat.repo.deleteRecord"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/network.habitat.repo.deleteRecord"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete a repository record, or ensure it doesn't exist. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["repo","collection","rkey"],"properties":{"repo":{"type":"string","description":"The handle or DID of the repo (aka, current account).","format":"at-identifier"},"collection":{"type":"string","description":"The NSID of the record collection.","format":"nsid"},"rkey":{"type":"string","description":"The Record Key.","format":"record-key"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK"},"400":{"description":"Bad Request","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["error","message"],"properties":{"error":{"type":"string","oneOf":[{"const":"InvalidRequest"}]},"message":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
